positive: A minimalist, stylized portrait of a celestial astronaut exploring an otherworldly, bioluminescent jungle. The astronaut, depicted with a sleek, matte white helmet and reflective visor, stands amidst giant, glowing flora and crystalline formations. The composition must feature a central, symmetrical composition with strong vertical lines. Emphasize high contrast between the deep indigo and teal background/jungle and the bright, glowing neon accents of the flora and the astronaut's suit. Use a vaporwave, ethereal synthwave aesthetic. Flat design elements mixed with detailed texture work. Isolated figure, clean silhouette, designed for apparel print, graphic novel style, concept art, dramatic rim lighting, cinematic wide shot.
